title: rubus ceratifolius
intro: Rubus ceratifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rubus ceratifolius include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of consuming Rubus ceratifolius include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus ceratifolius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
